heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 410oo–6 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated not to exceed $12,000,000 to carry out land acquisition and development as authorized in this subchapter.
notes: Amendments2017— inserted “land acquisition and development as authorized in” after “carry out”.Pub. L. 115–31
amendments: Amendments2017— inserted “land acquisition and development as authorized in” after “carry out”.Pub. L. 115–31
